alkylation reagent: cystines were reduced by iodoacetamide (IAA, 20 mM, Sigma Aldrich)
alkylation concentration: cystines were reduced by iodoacetamide (IAA, 20 mM, Sigma Aldrich)
cleavage agent: digestion was performed by the addition of 4 μg sequencing grade modified trypsin
collision energy: MS/MS data were obtained with 30% normalized collision energy using higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
enrichment method: we defined the HMGB1 interactome in resting and LPS-stressed monocytic THP-1 cells using BioID-based proximity proteomics
fractionation method: lysate fractioning (Fig. 1E) shows different distributions of endogenous HMGB1
fragmentation method: using higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) for ions with charge z > 1
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
ionization type: Eluted peptides were ionized by electrospray ionization
labeling: Stable isotype labeling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC) was done to transduced THP-1 cells
reduction reagent: with the addition of Halt Protease and Phosphatase Inhibitor Cocktail (Thermo Scientific) and 1 mM DTT
